title: 2024-2025 FALL SEMESTER DENTAL AND MEDICAL FACULTY TRANSFER APPLICATION RESULTS
content:
2024-2025 FALL SEMESTER DENTAL AND MEDICAL FACULTY TRANSFER APPLICATION RESULTS

CLICK HERE FOR 2024-2025 FALL SEMESTER DENTISTRY AND MEDICINE FACULTY ADDITIONAL ARTICLE DOMESTIC TRANSFER RESULTS.

CLICK HERE FOR 2024-2025 FALL SEMESTER DENTISTRY AND MEDICINE FACULTY GRADE POINT AVERAGE DOMESTIC TRANSFER RESULTS.

Substitute registration Date: 22.08.2024 - 29.08.2024

Note: After the primary registration dates are completed, reserve students will be called for registration as much as the remaining quota.

Students who come for registration must come with the originals of all the documents they have uploaded during the application. Registration will not be accepted with missing documents.
